programme.desc: A villain’s plans to steal the moon are foiled when he encounters the immense will of three little orphaned girls who look at him as a potential Dad.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's masterpiece follows a team of scientists on an island to witness real dinosaurs in a park, only to see everything go wrong when a storm hits.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: the Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this sixth chapter of the horror franchise, a new family moves into Katie and Kristi’s former house and discovers an evil presence that begins to terrorise their lives.

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: Up-and-coming U.S. marshal Teddy Daniels is assigned to investigate the disappearance of a patient from Boston's Shutter Island Ashecliffe Hospital.

programme.title: Blood Diamond
programme.desc: A smuggler, fisherman and reporter team up in search of a priceless pink diamond, a lost son and the dark story behind the diamond trade.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in his father's footsteps, Lt. Frank Drebin Jr. has the particular set of skills... to lead Police Squad and save the world!

programme.title: Hollywood on Set S1
programme.desc: Hollywood on Set S1

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: A pimp-cum-drug-dealer suffering from a mid-life crisis forms a band with his pal to reignite his passion for music.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's masterpiece follows a team of scientists on an island to witness real dinosaurs in a park, only to see everything go wrong when a storm hits.

programme.title: Smallfoot
programme.desc: The Bigfoot legend is turned upside down when a bright young Yeti finds something he thought didn’t exist—a human.

programme.title: Memories Of The Sword
programme.desc: 3 warriors pledge to fight against an incompetent king. However, a betrayal occurs leading to the death of one of the warriors. 18 years later, the daughter of the betrayed sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: An astronaut is left stranded in space because of an accident during a spaceflight. The former director of the space centre strives to bring him home safely...

programme.title: Ordinary Person
programme.desc: Sung-jin is a police officer involved in a conspiracy after he arrested a suspected murderer by chance. Gyu-nam make use of Sung-jin's weakness, his family, to strike a deal with him.

programme.title: The Pirates
programme.desc: Before the founding of the Joseon Dynasty, envoys from China lose the Royal Seal to a whale. A group of bandits attempt to retrieve it for a large reward and run into a group of pirates.

programme.title: Streaming
programme.desc: Top crime channel streamer Woo Sang goes live to catch a serial killer and reclaim fame—until he learns the killer is watching, turning his hunt into a deadly game.

programme.title: Love Me Ep11
programme.desc: Adapted from a Swedish drama, it tells the story of a woman who appears to live a perfect life holds a secret behind her loneliness.

programme.title: Love Me Finale
programme.desc: Adapted from a Swedish drama, it tells the story of a woman who appears to live a perfect life holds a secret behind her loneliness.

programme.title: Crazy Romance
programme.desc: Two co-workers navigate their feelings for each other through a minefield of office gossip and social media.

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed tough guy Jae-Pil and sexy guy Sang-Gu move to a countryside home. A spirit sealed in the basement awakens, leading to a high-stimulus chilling comedy they'll never forget.

programme.title: Only God Knows Everything
programme.desc: Do-woon has just been ordained. A man admits to killing his mother during confession. Torn between his duty as a priest and his desire for revenge as a son, he faces a demonic group...

programme.title: Canola
programme.desc: Gye-choon and her lost grandaughter Hye-ji reunited after 12 years, yet Hye-ji's strange behaviour raise questions on what happened to her while they were apart.

programme.title: Office
programme.desc: The investigation following a sales manager brutally killing his entire family leads to a track of mystery and tragedy in an overwhelmed work team at Seoul.

programme.title: Sori: Voice From The Heart
programme.desc: A father searching for his missing daughter finds a satellite that remembers sounds from across the world. Using his daughter's voice as a beacon, the satellite helps him track her down.

programme.title: Road To Boston
programme.desc: A group of marathoners want to run proudly under the Korean flag after Korea's liberation. Though they couldn't afford a pair of sneakers, they embark on an unforgettable journey to Boston.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: All is set for the Toy Green Picnic until Noddy finds some of the trees turned upside down! Was it the Ninjas climbing on them? Or the Pirates wanting an upside-down tree for Pirate Bay? Noddy launches an investigation to find out who's behind all this.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Knights have found a mysterious Golden Thing. But the Pirates insist it's their Golden Thing. Noddy tries to settle the argument by investigating: Who is the owner of the Golden Thing? He soon finds more and more Golden Things have been hidden all over Toyland.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When Revvit and his Reptool friends venture out of their ravine, the Dinotrux band together to save them from a flock of savage Scrapadactyls.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: As a new term begins, Maricela and her horse, Mystery, arrive at the academy to join Lucky, Pru and Abigail for the school year.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep and the others try to intervene with Thunk and Blurg's first date, they decide to run away so they can live happily ever after; Snoot and Ugga race each other to get to the Doomsday Skunkguin but are forced to put their differences aside once the weirder animals come out to hunt them down

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Ruffnut is captured by Dragon Hunters, it's up to Astrid and Tuffnut to defend Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Unaware of the war on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup, Snotlout and Johann discover an island full of dragons that have been wounded by the Dragon Hunters

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss and family go on Spring Break to visit his grandparents in the big city of Chicago. Boss uses the trip to test his business mettle, by getting in a promotion war at a real big adult company. And when a department store refuses to let Gigi and Tim return an item, they wind up unionizing the entire sales force.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are panicking after Gigi noticed Boss isn't growing, so Boss "puts himself under", taking a special formula that will turn him int a regular baby long enough to pass a Doctor's checkup. However, with Boss gone, all the villains from this season see it as the perfect time to strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold the floodgates.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Looking to trim costs, Boss unknowingly fires Boom Baby, a super-undercover Baby Corp worker who displays to parents how unsafe things are by pratfalling on them and crying for attention. Convinced he's the victim of a conspiracy, Boom leaves a wake of parent worry in his path, forcing Boss to stop him.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Melvin isn't exactly their friend ... but it's not like George and Harold can just let him be held captive by diabolical Biglyans, right? Right?!?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Oh, the indignity: George and Harold are forced to perform spa treatments on gigantic Biglyans. Also, Dr. Fitzgibbons reveals a shocking secret.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms. Nowhere’s mission – what could Cleve be up to in the desert?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or “The Dead End,” in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom. The crew manages to steal a few of the dune buggies and take off into the desert! Meanwhile, Rafaela and Matsuo bust into a secret military base and steal an important piece of tech for Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim tries to impress Claire's parents when invited over for BBQ, but when his Amulet goes haywire, Jim must contend with his own worst enemy – himself

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Skunk didn't smell. Skunk smelt as sweet as sweet can be. Infact, whenever any animal had a smelly problem they went straight to Skunk. And then one day naughty Baboon tricks Skunk into tasting the yucky Smellyfruit! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Cricket didn't chirrup. Infact Cricket didn't do anything at all and it was beginning to get him down. Every animal has a use. Elephant trumpets, Lion roars...but what does Cricket do? And then one day Cricket discovers that he has rhythm. Cricket finds the beat! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Julian is very excited about the Sealife Awareness Day at Greendale School. While he's talking to Pat about it, his dad gets a call from Ben - a special delivery! Pat discovers it's a giant inflatable shark which is to be the surprise centrepiece of the Sealife day. But when Pat stops to help Alf mend a gate, a mix-up with parcel tape ends up with the whale accidentally inflating and floating off... Pat must use his ingenuity to catch the whale and - most important of all - deliver it in time for the special Sealife Awareness event...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat must deliver Ben to Greendale School, dressed as superhero, The Blue Flash. But Ben keeps stopping to help people on the way and his costume gets increasingly ruined! Meanwhile at the school, Julian can't wait to meet his hero but Sarah Gilbertson insists that The Blue Flash isn't real... At last Pat arrives at the school with Ben wearing a new costume hastily cobbled together by Pat. Julian isn't fooled. Looks like The Blue Flash isn't real after all... But then Pat tells the kids how Ben helped people on the way and they realise he is a REAL superhero!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Roary is in a mischievous mood and keeps crashing into things. Big Chris has a great idea how Roary can burn up all his energy and be helpful at the same time!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Farmer Green and FB are very nervous about going to Mama Mia's garden party. James and the other cars offer to teach them how to behave at such an event. But everything doesn't quite go to plan…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris has agreed to do a parachute jump for charity but loses his nerve on the big day. Can Roary talk him through it, just like Big Chris did for him when he got scared?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: The brass band booked for the Silver Hatch parade have cancelled. Mr Carburettor will be furious if he doesn't have music at his parade. Roary and his friends think up an ingenious plan...

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: It's the day of the Toyland Singalong and Clockwork Mouse, an enthusiastic but awful singer, says everything must be perfect! But then her precious key goes missing and Noddy need to quickly investigate: Who stole Clockwork Mouse's key?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The banner for Revs' Air show has disappeared. Where can it be ? Could someone be trying to spoil Revs' show? Noddy investigates.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When the brightest star in the sky falls, Noddy has to find it and work out how to get it back into its place in the sky before its light goes out forever. Will he manage in time for the fairies Sparkle party ?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: A strange new kind of butterfly is pestering the toys in Toyland – just when the Queen organises a butterfly ball. Noddy has to find out what's going on fast !

programme.desc: A teenage girl's discovery of a vintage Polaroid camera becomes a nightmare when she finds out that whoever takes their photo with it meet a tragic death soon afterward

programme.title: Dragon Fist
programme.desc: A dishonored student of the Dragon Fist Sect seeks revenge for the death of his teacher.

programme.title: Hunter Killer

programme.title: A Better Tomorrow

programme.title: Aloners

programme.title: Chef

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 78
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 8
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year - Episode 8
programme.desc: In the Grand Final, three outstanding artists each have four hours to paint a portrait of adored comedy icon Denise Scott, each drawing on their unique approach to artmaking.

programme.title: Art Works - Across the Regions: Hobart to Karratha
programme.desc: We see Women of Troy at Hobart's Ten Days on the Island festival; visit Burrup Peninsula's ancient petroglyphs with Perun Bonser; meet Sammy Hawker on the South Coast; and head to Hanging Rock with Nick Cave and Warren Ellis.

programme.title: Australia In Colour - Australia at Play
programme.desc: Sport and the arts are part of the culture of the new nation from the outset and say much about the character of Australians and their way of life.

programme.title: Alone Australia - Episode 2
programme.desc: In a battle against time, the survivalists hurry to establish shelters or catch food before their energy reserves run out.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 78
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice - Lehmo
programme.desc: Full time funny man Lehmo tries to whip up something French, whilst Alice tries to change his mind on mushrooms!

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 8
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

She finds out from Johnny that Myanmar army rebels had killed Dex's parents when he was young, and he has been keeping a lookout for them, not ruling out that Dex could have killed these people.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 12 关键证人

They let Nick investigate the massacre's survivors, not ruling out that the survivors took their revenge. Yu Xuan suspects Dex is the murderer and reminds Dex to be careful in their conversation and that she is willing to help. Dex does not comment on it and changes the topic.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 17 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Yu Jie manages to find Uncle Chan's old lover, and he brings Xi Yue and Uncle Chan to the Palliative Care Centre to find her. However, they realise that they are too late as she has recently passed away, and sadly there is no fate for Uncle Chan to meet her again. Uncle Chan is disappointed, and Yu Jie comforts Xi Yue as she starts crying inconsolably. Yu Jie pities her, and this ignites in his strong feelings for her. He confesses to Xi Yue. Xi Yue does not dare to accept his feelings.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 18 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Xi Yue shows concern for Yu Jie's injuries after Bella hits him. Yu Jie confesses once again, hoping that Xi Yue will leave Singapore together with him, and this causes Xi Yue to be flustered. Whilst on their way home, their feelings for each other permeate between them. When the lift door opens, they see Yan Xun standing outside, and realise that he has returned from his work overseas. Yan Xun does not suspect their relationship, but Xi Yue feels guilty.

Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: Intimate Stranger
programme.desc: In post-COVID Tokyo, single mother Megumi is desperate to find her missing son Shinpei. After a shady young man claims to know her son’s whereabouts, he is invited into Megumi’s home where he soon uncovers a shocking secret.

programme.title: Your Children
programme.desc: Anja and Frank are holidaying by the Baltic Sea with their two children. Anja leaves them alone for a while, but upon return, they are nowhere in sight. While searching for them, Anja discovers that Frank has never told her the truth about his father.

programme.title: Catch The Wind
programme.desc: Edith is a middle-aged woman, estranged from her son and now about to lose her job as a textile factory worker. With nothing to hold her to her hometown, she decides to move to Morocco where her factory has relocated instead of facing unemployment.

programme.title: My Killer Buddy
programme.desc: Denni is 10 years old and has a mission, to save his mother from his father’s violence. For this reason he devises an infallible plan: he will have him killed by someone who kills people for a living, a super-killer.

programme.title: Mr. K
programme.desc: Mr. K, a traveling magician, finds himself in a Kafkaesque nightmare when he can’t find the exit of the hotel, he has slept in. His attempts to get out only pull him deeper, entangling him further with the hotel and its curious inhabitants.

programme.title: The Little Comrade
programme.desc: During Stalinist tyranny, 6-year-old Leelo’s mother is sent to a prison camp. Haunted by her mother’s last words telling her to be a good kid, Leelo vows to be on her best behaviour in the hope that it will bring her mother back.

programme.title: The Cave Of The Yellow Dog
programme.desc: Nansal, a Mongolian nomadic girl finds a puppy and brings it home but her father believes it to be bad luck. But when the dog saves the family’s baby, he finally accepts it. Central to this tale is the belief in the cycle of rebirth between man and dog.

programme.title: Run Up!
programme.desc: After a life-altering accident shatters her dreams, Elodie, a young hiker turned paraplegic, discovers the power of wheelchair sports. With the help of her trainer Isabelle, she is able to awaken from her lethargy and recognize true victories in life.

programme.title: The President
programme.desc: After a brutal coup topples his regime, a fallen dictator flees with his young grandson. Disguised as street musicians, they cross a country scarred by his rule, exposed firsthand to the suffering he had ignored.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: Intimate Stranger
programme.desc: In post-COVID Tokyo, single mother Megumi is desperate to find her missing son Shinpei. After a shady young man claims to know her son’s whereabouts, he is invited into Megumi’s home where he soon uncovers a shocking secret.

programme.title: I Am Dating You Not
programme.desc: Roberto loves Paula but she still can’t get over her ex-boyfriend. Meanwhile Roberto’s former girlfriend wants him back. Could office romance get more complicated? A romantic farce starring Virginia Rodríquez, Best Actress, Malaga Film Festival 2013.

programme.title: The Beautiful Spark
programme.desc: After losing his job in a scandal, Michelin-starred chef Philippe gets a second chance at La Belle Étincelle - a unique restaurant run by Virginie, and staffed by her autistic son Noé alongside other young people with disabilities.

programme.title: Veins Of The World
programme.desc: After his father dies in a tragic car accident, 11-year-old Amra sets out to continue his father’s vision of the traditional nomad way of life and to continue his fight against global mining companies who threaten to destroy it.

programme.title: Push-Pull
programme.desc: An elderly couple plan to finalize their divorce and split a vintage bread table that holds their shared memories. With a massive crosscut saw, they aim to divide the table and express the unspoken emotions of their forty years as co-owners of a bakery.

programme.title: Murder in the Finist ère
programme.desc: When a storm fells a sacred oak in Brittany, Captain Morgane Ledantec uncovers human bones tied to a druidic past she once shared. As Morgane’s buried gift of foresight resurfaces, she must confront old friends hiding secrets of their own.

programme.title: The Little Comrade
programme.desc: During Stalinist tyranny, 6-year-old Leelo’s mother is sent to a prison camp. Haunted by her mother’s last words telling her to be a good kid, Leelo vows to be on her best behaviour in the hope that it will bring her mother back.

programme.title: Run Up!
programme.desc: After a life-altering accident shatters her dreams, Elodie, a young hiker turned paraplegic, discovers the power of wheelchair sports. With the help of her trainer Isabelle, she is able to awaken from her lethargy and recognize true victories in life.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: I Am Dating You Not
programme.desc: Roberto loves Paula but she still can’t get over her ex-boyfriend. Meanwhile Roberto’s former girlfriend wants him back. Could office romance get more complicated? A romantic farce starring Virginia Rodríquez, Best Actress, Malaga Film Festival 2013.

programme.title: 15 Years
programme.desc: After being wrongfully imprisoned for 15 years, piano prodigy Jenny meets Syrian refugee Omar and agrees to accompany him on a talent show. There, Jenny faces the man who framed her and her ex, and she must choose between vengeance and happiness.

programme.title: Push-Pull
programme.desc: An elderly couple plan to finalize their divorce and split a vintage bread table that holds their shared memories. With a massive crosscut saw, they aim to divide the table and express the unspoken emotions of their forty years as co-owners of a bakery.

programme.title: The Beautiful Spark
programme.desc: After losing his job in a scandal, Michelin-starred chef Philippe gets a second chance at La Belle Étincelle - a unique restaurant run by Virginie, and staffed by her autistic son Noé alongside other young people with disabilities.

programme.title: Almost Entirely A Slight Disaster
programme.desc: In contemporary Istanbul, four youths in their twenties find themselves brought together by chance. Restless, disillusioned, and searching for direction, the four characters go face to face with the anxieties of their generation.

programme.title: Veins Of The World
programme.desc: After his father dies in a tragic car accident, 11-year-old Amra sets out to continue his father’s vision of the traditional nomad way of life and to continue his fight against global mining companies who threaten to destroy it.

programme.title: For A Moment, Forever
programme.desc: A young popstar overwhelmed by fame meets a troubled ex-rocker teaching music to adolescents at a therapy centre. Both longing for love, they get closer as affection for music connects them, but shall they overcome the burdens of his past?

programme.title: Murder in the Finist ère
programme.desc: When a storm fells a sacred oak in Brittany, Captain Morgane Ledantec uncovers human bones tied to a druidic past she once shared. As Morgane’s buried gift of foresight resurfaces, she must confront old friends hiding secrets of their own.

programme.title: Man And A Baby
programme.desc: Dad (Antti) is left alone with a newborn after the mom (Pia) decides motherhood is not her thing. Single dad tries to survive alone in "women's world" and keep the baby and himself alive.

programme.title: A Childhood
programme.desc: As summer drags by, 13-year-old Jimmy, forced by circumstance to become an adult too soon, runs up against the limits of his small hometown and his turbulent life, caught between a mother on the slide and a stepfather who keeps her down.

programme.title: Backwards
programme.desc: Inspired by true events. The story of a young mother of an autistic boy, whose many years of stubbornness and the fight against bureaucracy and human heartlessness led to changes in the education system.

programme.title: Sima's Song
programme.desc: In 1970s Afghanistan, best friends Suraya and Sima are torn apart by political upheaval. Suraya is a wealthy communist and Sima is a traditional singer, and though their paths diverge, their enduring bond proves stronger than ideology.
